## Profile.getTestWorkspaceID() method

GetTestWorkspaceID returns the test workspace ID (e.g., "wksp_test_456") from the config file. Ported from: profile.go TestWorkspaceID field

**Signature:**

```typescript
getTestWorkspaceID(): string | null;
```

**Returns:**

string \| null
